My role involves leveraging cloud solutions to drive efficiency and scalability. My previous experience includes serving as a Cloud Solution Architect (CSA) at Microsoft for the Dominican Republic, where I developed a deep understanding of cloud architecture and solutions.  Over the past seven years, I have provided consultancy on DevOps methodologies and cloud architecture, ensuring alignment with agile practices. I have also been a design consultant for Microservices architectures, particularly for banks in the Dominican Republic.  As a passionate advocate for continuous learning and self-improvement, I have spoken at international forums on Cloud Governance, Container Security, and Linux Administration. I have conducted numerous workshops on Linux, DevOps, Docker, and Kubernetes, benefiting organizations both nationally and internationally.

Certified across multiple cloud-native and DevOps technologies, I am dedicated to delivering scalable, secure, and cost-efficient solutions. For inquiries, reach me at devops.saurabhkadam@gmail.com
